texto: So why not make it better? If we want to see goodness in our lives, we should make it happen. If I can bring just a little help to someone's life, even for a moment, it's better than doing nothing at all.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Davon M. Custis que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “So why not make it better? If we want to see goodness in our lives, we should make it happen. If …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, goodness, better, com foco em reflexao.
